sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current state
seg = current_frame.segmentation
blue = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'b'][0]
print(f"Blue: rows {blue['boundary'][0][0]}-{blue['boundary'][2][0]}, cols {blue['boundary'][0][1]}-{blue['boundary'][1][1]}")
green = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'N'][0]
print(f"Timer: {green['pixels']}")

# Check adjacency
adj = seg['adjacency_list']
blue_id = [n['id'] for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'b'][0]
yellow_ids = [n['id'] for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'Y']
for yid in yellow_ids:
    is_adj = any([a, b] == [blue_id, yid] or [a, b] == [yid, blue_id] for a, b in adj)
    print(f"Blue adjacent to yellow {yid}: {is_adj}")

# Check all nodes
for n in seg['nodes']:
    print(f"  {n['color']}: pixels={n['pixels']}, boundary={n['boundary']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
